external_references.description: AhnLab. (2022, April 4). SystemBC Being Used by Various Attackers . Retrieved June 18, 2025.
Black Lotus Labs . (2025, September 18). SystemBC: Bringing the noise. Retrieved December 15, 2025.

objects.description: [SystemBC](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9001) has the ability to decrypt RC4 encrypted packets and to decode obfuscated data before C2 communication.(Citation: AhnLab_SystemBC_Apr2022) Additionally, [SystemBC](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9001) has decrypted its config file that was encoded with XOR and a hardcoded 40-byte key.(Citation: Lumen_SystemBC_Sept2025)
